name: Abyssal Baths
description:
You discover a secluded chamber.

Steam rises from bubbling pools of hot liquid that shifts colors with hypnotic rhythm. Barnacled growths hang from the ceiling, dripping viscous fluid that hisses and writhes when it touches the surface. The air feels heavy, laden with salt and something unmistakably organic.

As you approach the edge of the largest pool, the liquid ripples. The waters bubble more intensely as if anticipating your entry.

name: Amalgamator
description:
CLANG! CLANG!!!

You hear the echoes of metal upon metal on the otherside of a wall...

As you press your head against the wall to listen in—the wall opens up, revealing a hulking six-armed figure toiling away.
Its “face” is a swirling vortex of glowing sigils that shift about.

“One with an Ascending Spirit has found my workshop? Let's get COMBINING!”

options.title: Combine Defends
options.description: Remove 2 Defends. Add  to your Deck.

options.title: Combine Strikes
options.description: Remove 2 Strikes. Add  to your Deck.

name: Aroma of Chaos
description:
Upon trudging through a thick underbrush and making it into a clearing, you're hit with an unplaceable nostalgia.

A mix of floral scents, putrid decay, and something else entirely. The scent grows stronger with each step, and you feel as though the world around you is warping and twisting.

Overcome with a sense of shifting chaos[/rainbow], you begin to lose your sense of self.

options.title: Let Go
options.description: Transform a card in your Deck.

options.title: Maintain Control
options.description: Upgrade a card in your Deck.

name: Battleworn Dummy
description:
As you approach, it begins to rumble and fizzle and lights up brilliantly!

“BZZZT! TIME TO TRAIN!!! YOU HAVE 3 TURNS TO DEFEAT ME!
CHOOSE A SETTING OR FACE LETHAL HUMILIATION.
Here are the options:”

After the terrifying message, the dummy carefully reads out detailed instructions.

What do you choose?

options.title: Setting 1
options.description: Fight a  HP dummy. Procure 1 random Potion.

options.title: Setting 2
options.description: Fight a  HP dummy. Upgrade 2 random cards.

options.title: Setting 3
options.description: Fight a  HP dummy. Obtain a random Relic.

name: Brain Leech
description:
*thunk*

A sharp pain is felt atop your head and a thought stabs into your mind.

“SHARE KNOWLEDGE???”

You are unsure how to proceed...

options.title: Rip the Leech Off
options.description: Lose 5 HP. Gain a Colorless card reward.

options.title: Share Knowledge
options.description: Choose 1 of 5 random cards to add to your Deck.

name: Bugslayer
description:
As you're fending off a swarm of aggressive insects you suddenly notice a Mighty Rugged Warrior-Man fighting beside you this whole time!

The insects, sensing defeat, scatter. You turn to your fellow fighter.
“Would you like any tips on exterminating these pests?”

How polite. You nod and accept his offer.

name: Byrdonis Nest
description:
You spot an enormous Shambling Beast chase off an injured Green Byrd.

In the alcove the byrd fled from, a single unguarded egg lies abandoned.

Your stomach gurgles...

name: Colorful Philosophers
description:
Before you is a rather epic sight.
You see 3 different colored statues towering over a dais, having a heated debate over the philosophical implications of color.

As you listen in, you get a sense that the most important question at hand is which color truly is THE BEST.

You chime in with your thoughts.

name: Colossal Flower
description:
There is a colossal flower growing atop a mountain of bones.

As its color-shifting petals[/rainbow] pulsate, you sense there is a Powerful Cluster of Pollen in the center but the undulating petals are razor sharp and unpredictable.

You could grab some of the golden nectar, but reaching the prize in the center is so tempting...

name: Crystal Sphere
description:
“I predicted you'd enter...!”

A raspy voice calls out as you enter a mystic hut.

“Your destiny has brought you here. We must uncover your future and fortunes so you can SAVE US ALL!!”
“Okay, here are the options for the Crystal Sphere reading. Be sure to sign this waiver as well,” she says while bringing out pen and parchment.

name: Darv
description:
...where did I put... Oh!
Come to see my collection!? Take anything from that pile over there, put it to good use!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Here, take one of these forgotten gems with ya!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
I’ve got things to do today!
Take whatever ya want from that pile!!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: You’re a beautiful hunk of junk, you know that?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Still keeping at it, I see... Let’s see if we can upgrade ya!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
I’ve been holding on to your friend’s uhh... um.
Nevermind nevermind!!

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <Inquisitive beeps>

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: My scrappy scrapper, forget I said all that!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
The flaming warrior has returned!
I’ve got just the thing for ya!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Good to see ya still kickin’ and bashin’ em heads in!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: I’m still holding on to that heavy blade of yours... but I can’t find no one to restore it.

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text: The Ironclad stares at Darv.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Maybe the Architect knows somethin’.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: I can tell you’re a serious one. What can I do for ya missy?

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Anything to help me kill a most loathsome man.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Very well then... have a gander!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Still on that warpath? I ain’t gonna stop ya!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: This book seems tied to ya, been around longer than you have.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: How did you come into possession of that?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Scary things have a way of ending up in my collection.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: What brings the likes of you up here? Wanna take a look at my collection?

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I do enjoy fine wares...

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Yeah!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Back for more your highness?!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: To my new friend, do I have somethin’ for ya!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I’m listening!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
I’d give it but the Architect nabbed it from me!!
Help a buddy out! Do me a favor will ya?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Back in the Spire for you too huh?
Can’t resist those shinies right?!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: I’ll trade ya somethin’ nice for that trophy you got there!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Pity ya don’t remember all my generosity!
Yeah yeah, you know how Neow is...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Well! Let’s get you equipped for that final showdown or whatevah!

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
...where did I put... Oh!
Come to see my collection!? Take anything from that pile over there, put it to good use!

name: Dense Vegetation
description:
Having taken the wrong path for a good while, you find yourself in a thick jungle of ferns, shrubs, and vines. Especially vines. Exhaustion sets in, and a dark thought comes to mind:

“You are lost, unprepared, and the inevitability of death is approaching.”

What do you do?

options.title: Trudge On
options.description: Remove a card from your Deck. Lose 11 HP.

name: Doll Room
description:
You enter a hidden room...

It's packed with an array of dolls. Each are unique, their expressions ranging from joy to sorrow, their attire spanning centuries and realms beyond your own.

A chorus of whispers grows louder and louder until the dolls are shouting over each other and calling for you...

You must choose one and leave immediately.

options.title: Examine Each and Make the Best Choice
options.description: Lose 15 HP. Choose 1 of 3 Doll Relics.

options.title: Take Some Time
options.description: Lose 5 HP. Choose 1 of 2 Doll Relics.

name: Doors of Light and Dark
description:
A doorway existed where none existed moments before...

You enter to find two shimmering doorways and a well-dressed doorman.
“Finally, a visitor! Please please! Choose a door, any door!”

Are we still in the Spire? How is this place so clean?

name: Drowning Beacon
description:
Crossing a dreamscape of rocks and still waters, you emerge to face a sinking lighthouse emitting anti-light.

You can bottle up the eerily-glowing water that has pooled here or climb up the dilapidated structure to retrieve the lens.

name: Endless Conveyor
description:
You lumber into a shack with a bright but crooked sign that reads:
“ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!”

Inside, a willowy multi-armed chef is deftly preparing bites of food and placing them onto a winding chitinous belt.

One of the chef's arms point to a sign:
35 Gold each

options.title: Observe the Chef
options.description: Upgrade a random card in your Deck.

name: The Merchant???
description: Placeholder

name: Field of Man-Sized Holes
description:
The sudden sight of a massive field, gouged with large outlines of bodies, stops you in your tracks.

One of these outlines matches your own.

It's perfect...

options.title: Resist
options.description: Remove 2 cards from your Deck. Add  to your Deck.

name: Grave of the Forgotten
description:
There is a single grave with a roiling blue flame...

A prideful warrior died in battle but its soul is restless. It wants to keep fighting, you feel it begging to journey with you.

But perhaps it's better for it to face the truth?

options.title: Confront with Truth
options.description: Add  to your Deck. Enchant a card that Exhausts with .

options.title: Locked
options.description: You have no cards with Exhaust that can be Enchanted.

name: Hungry for Mushrooms
description:
How long has it been since you ate?
...wait, what's that fantastic smell?

Following the scent, you reach a cozy campground with all manner of tasty mushrooms being cooked! You don't consider the safety of eating these mushrooms because you are so hungry.
(So hungry that you don't notice the dead adventurer)

name: Infested Automaton
description:
There's a chamber filled with dead robots.

A lone automaton still has a faintly glowing core but it's engulfed by a grotesque, organic growth and doesn't respond.

name: Jungle Maze Adventure
description:
In a clearing, you run into a Ragtag Group of Adventurers looking down and gesturing at a gigantic maze.

They offer to join forces with you in an Epic Quest to loot the riches of this maze. As an experienced adventurer yourself, it's clear this maze is filled with deadly traps and guardians.

It would be easier if you work together, but then you would have to split the loot.

name: The Lost Wisp
description:
In the distance is an odd sight. Mounds and mounds of deceased insects, surrounding what looks to be a small glowing mote.
It seems to be an effective attractant for all manner of bugs but you see it lash out some flames!

You move closer to investigate.

options.title: Capture the Wisp
options.description: Add  to your Deck. Obtain the .

options.title: Locked
options.description: Your Max HP is too low.

name: Luminous Choir
description:
You stumble upon a clearing bathed in an unnatural blue glow. Towering mushrooms pulse with bioluminescence, their caps swollen and glistening. As you approach, the fungi begin to emit haunting, melodic tones that reverberate throughout your chest.

You notice something gleaming, embedded within the largest mushroom's flesh, pulsing in rhythm with the fungal song.

options.title: Offer Tribute
options.description: Pay 149 Gold. Obtain a random Relic.

options.title: Reach into the Flesh
options.description: Remove 2 cards from your Deck. Add Spore Mind to your Deck.

name: Morphic Grove
description:
You enter a grove of crystalline trees, and they begin to quiver excitedly!
A chorus of hellos and welcomes bombard you as a group of Morphics burst forth from trees.

One of the Morphics is fidgeting in the corner, clearly not as sociable as the others.

Approach the group or the loner?

name: Neow
description:
I’ve... remade you....
...go... ..up.....

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: ...hello... ..again.....

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
...awaken...
..Awaken.....

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
..receive.... this....
..blessing.. ...go......

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: ..I’ve... ..brought... ..you back...

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: ...kill.. the... ARCHITECT

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
...construct.. what...
....have you.. become...?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
...he.. can...
....fix.. you.. ...everything....

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
...I.. can’t... ..make...
...you.. forget....

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <resolute beeping sounds>

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
..arise.. my.. warrior...
..time... to fight...again...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: ..still.. lost.. to rage... good...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
..remember.. the.. first..time
...you ..came...before me..

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: ..so..furious...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: ...so..useful...

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: ...we.... share... ..the same... ..goal....

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: HE KILLED ALL THAT I LOVE!!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: ...my power..... is yours...

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: He... still.. ....breathes...

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Is... it.. ...even... possible...?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
... Architect.... ..weakening....
..we.... stronger...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Oversized blue creature, I am the future King!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
..cute...
...you... will see.. ..me... ...again....

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: ...again..?

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Why can’t I win?!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: ...receive.. this... ..blessing...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: ...yes, thank you Neow.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
...returned.. from... outside?
..knew... you’d... be back...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
...your..
 ...trophy.. awaits...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: ..both...know..agony..of..family...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
..still...seeking..approval...?
...FOOLISH...

name: Nonupeipe
description:
I haven’t had a visitor in a millennia!
You’re looking quite drab, here, let’s find something delightful for you to wear.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Madness awaits at the top. Don my power and vanquish.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
You’ve traveled so far to reach me!
Come closer, receive my blessing.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Could a construct truly be worthy of my blessings?
Come forward, Defect. You will be the most beautiful of all automata.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: My poor, battered machine, let me refine you.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: I usually don’t like the Architect’s things, but I admit you’re growing on me.

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <embarrassed chirp>

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Ah, the Ironclad finally arrives before me.
Come forth and I shall endow you with my power.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Ironclad ironclad... was my previous gift not enough?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
You return again my champion? How many times?
Were you not strong enough to wipe out entire clans before?

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Your guards are dead, rumors say you can bestow blessings for those who wish the Architect dead.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
I appreciate someone capable and shall grant a measure of my power.
Next time, don’t kill my guards.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: A mage needs fine accouterments for battle. Come forth, Necrobinder.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: The Architect won’t be pleased to see that pet of yours.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Do you mean Osty? He will be the one to deliver the final blow.

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I seek audience with Nonupeipe!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Such beautiful robes you’ve brought from faraway lands!
Have your minions bring you closer and I will bless thee.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Royal blessings for royal visitors.
Servants! Fetch some tea for us.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: The Architect has gone mad! If only a noble champion could save us from this plight...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
Fear not! I, the Regent, will put an end to the madness!
But first, tea!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
A little thief has snuck into my domain?
Don’t think I can’t see you? Come on out!

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: The Silent steps out of the shadows...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
A huntress, what beckons your return to the Spire?
Approach and don these blessings.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: I have prepared gifts for you, assassin, don’t be shy.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Of all of her puppets, you surprise me most.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
What took your first life? Did Neow find you?
A shame you don’t speak.

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
I haven’t had a visitor in a millennia!
You’re looking quite drab, here, let’s find something delightful for you to wear.

name: Orobas
description: Puppet puppet!! All the way up here?! Take these, take take!

options.title: Locked
options.description: You have no starter relics or cards.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Try this!!!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Very good finds!! Look look!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
What! Servant construct?! Still working!!
Why here? Why not at Factory??

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Shiny orbs! How work?
Ouch!!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Core broken? Neow use broken construct?
Manipulated?

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <quietly beeps>

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Architect fix you?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: An Ironclad!? How possible?? Scary. Very scary!!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Contract signer? Why!? Bad choice? Yes. Mistake!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Wishing you freedom!! Wishing hard!
Vakuu bad. Very bad! Architect free you?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Dead?! Not dead! Why puppet? Big hand!!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
I’m no puppet. There’s a man I must kill.
What can you do for me?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Killing bad!! Take this instead!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Not dead one! Good gifts for you!! Violence bad.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: No violence! Collect shiny instead... Shiny!!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
My quest will only end when the Architect is no more.
Violence is inevitable.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Architect not bad! Maybe talk? Talking good!! Very good!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Traveller! From space!? Where in space?
How from space? Pointy head! Little friends!!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: The Regent monologues for hours.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Exciting! Impressive!! More! More!!!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
More stories! Found these for you!
Now tell more story!!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
My number one fan! Orobas, friend!
Lovely to see you’re still alive!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Stories?!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Of course of course... but have you found any trinkets for me?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Infection...? BLIGHT!? Take and go!!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Not contagious? Very dying? Architect help you?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Where sisters? Scary mean sisters!
Be good person! Don’t be like sisters!!

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text: Puppet puppet!! All the way up here?! Take these, take take!

name: Pael
description:
A puppet has arrived?
Can you check on Father? I’m too tired...

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Welcome back friend. Let my flesh help you...

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Pael is sleeping. His snoring shakes the room.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Troubled automaton, looking for your friend?
Let me help...

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Do constructs dream?
Watch and copy me...

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
I dreamt of your friend...
Father can restore Flaw...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: You contain such rage. Take from me and find some peace...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Do you remember how it feels to dream?
It is good to sleep...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
You must quell your flames.
Father can free you...

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Such malice paints your heart.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: We would share the same paint if you knew what’s befallen me.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
There is no peace on your path.
Take a part of me to ease your burdens...

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
The one with the Hand returns.
Painful memories. Take my strength and leave...

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Killing Father won’t bring peace.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: You call that thing your father!?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: We do not choose our family...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
Hello! I am the Regent.
Hellooo?? HELLO!?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Quiet down now.
Take a part of me and be on your way...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
I’m back! Ah, you’re asleep of course.
Let’s see here...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Why do you give yourself away?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Why not give when I have an abundance of flesh?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
When you return, I will be replenished anew.
That’s what sleep does...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Murderous creature, no need for violence here.
Have part of me and find peace...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Trophy hunting? Sure, take a part of me...
Whatever grants you comfort...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
You’ve poisoned me...?
What is this going to...? zZZzz...

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
A puppet has arrived?
Can you check on Father? I’m too tired...

name: Potion Courier
description:
There is a sour smell in the air and shortly after, you find a Potion Courier collapsed on the ground.
Unmoving. Lifeless. Dead!?
While their belongings have been ransacked, there is a batch of Foul Smelling Potions with a note: "Recipient: Merchant".

name: Punch Off
description:
Two Punch Constructs are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...

Should you try to nab it?

options.title: Nab
options.description: Add Injury to your Deck. Obtain a random Relic.

name: Ranwid the Elder
description:
You are approached by the oldest person you have ever seen.
“We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!”

You do not know this man.

options.title: Locked
options.description: You don't have any Potions that can be given.

options.title: Locked
options.description: You don't have any Relics that can be given.

name: Reflections snoitcelfeR
description:
What is this? Something feels wrong here...
...ereh gnorw sleef gnihtemoS ?siht si tahW

options.title: Shatter
options.description: Duplicate your Deck. Receive Bad Luck.

options.title: Touch a Mirror
options.description: Downgrade 2 random cards. Upgrade 4 random cards.

name: Relic Trader
description:
You turn a corner and suddenly, a shadowy figure is just standing there. He pivots to face you.

“Welcome! What're ya trading?”
The figure inquires as he flares open his cloak to reveal a slew of suspicious wares.

name: Room Full of Cheese
description:
This room is full of cheese!!!

You look around to see if there are any traps and above you is... more cheese. The candles in this room appear to be made of cheese. The furniture is also cheese.
Suddenly, the door behind you slams shut.

It is made of cheese.

options.title: Gorge
options.description: Choose 2 of 8 random Common cards to add to your Deck.

options.title: Search
options.description: Lose 14 HP. Obtain the Chosen Cheese.

name: The Round Tea Party
description:
You find an invitation for a “Sir Galalot” to a tea party and decide to show up in his stead.

Upon entering an unassuming rotunda, you find yourself in the midst of commanders, generals, warlords, and mercenaries having... tea?
The gigantic knight donning a golden crown speaks.

“Thou art late for Tea?!”

options.title: Pick a Fight
options.description: Lose 11 HP. Obtain a random Relic.

name: Sapphire Seed
description:
You narrowly avoid stepping on a bright, sharp... seed? Its unmistakable color gives away that it's a Sapphire Seed! Weren't these incredible seeds supposed to be extinct!?

Legends say that consuming one can greatly amplify your endurance, but what if you plant and nourish it instead?

options.title: Consume
options.description: Heal 9 HP. Upgrade a card in your Deck.

name: Self-Help Book
description:
On the floor lies a tome,
“Top 3 Ways to Conquer the Spire”

The book is encrusted with blood so you find this manuscript highly suspicious.

Will you read it?

options.title: Move On
options.description: You don't have any cards that can be Enchanted.

options.title: Read the Entire Book
options.description: Choose a Power to Enchant with  2.

options.title: Locked
options.description: You don't have any Powers that can be Enchanted.

options.title: Read a Random Passage
options.description: Choose a Skill to Enchant with  2.

options.title: Locked
options.description: You don't have any Skills that can be Enchanted.

options.title: Read the Back
options.description: Choose an Attack to Enchant with  2.

options.title: Locked
options.description: You don't have any Attacks that can be Enchanted.

name: Slippery Bridge
description: While crossing a rickety wooden bridge, there is a sudden torrent of rain. Massive gusts of wind buffet you, threatening to end your journey.

options.title: Hold On
options.description: Lose  HP. The card in the above option is randomized.

name: Spiraling Whirlpool
description:
You happen upon a Massive Spiraling Whirlpool. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.

Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......

What do you do?

options.title: Observe
options.description: Enchant a Strike or Defend with Spiral.

options.title: Reach In
options.description: Obtain a random Relic. Add Writhe to your Deck.

name: Spirit Grafter
description:
Above, a cocoon is shaking and wriggling, about to burst forth!

...it stops wriggling. The cocoon ignites! What is going on?
In a flash of light and flame, a Spirit Grafter rushes into you, threatening to merge with your being to become complete.

options.title: Let It In
options.description: Heal 25 HP. Add Metamorphosis to your Deck.

options.title: Rejection
options.description: Lose 9 HP. Remove a card from your Deck.

name: Stone of All Time
description:
A massive boulder sits in the middle of an abandoned courtyard.

A plaque reads:
Stone of All Time.

Its presence, shape, and adornments indicate that this courtyard was built around this Stone and that it has never moved from this spot.

options.title: Push
options.description: Lose 6 HP. Enchant an Attack with Vigorous 8.

name: The Sunken Statue
description:
You spot an aged statue half submerged in a pond; its hands gently rest atop a stone sword.

Something is also glittering at the bottom of the pond.
Votive offerings perhaps?

You could really use some money...

name: Sunken Treasury
description:
A path leads you into a partially submerged vault.
There are 2 chests but only 1 brittle key.

The First Chest: Shaking it, you get jingly-jangly noises. Bit of gold.
The Second Chest: Enormous, ornate, and clearly cursed. Lots of gold!

name: Symbiote
description:
Along your travels, you stumble upon a dark, amorphous polyp. You can sense that it is very old, and very evil.

Approach...

options.title: Locked
options.description: None of your Attacks can be Enchanted.

name: Tablet of Truth
description:
You defeat a pair of Guardian Kin and make your way into a protected vault.

Inside is a tablet with familiar inscriptions. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.

The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its healing energies instead.

options.title: Decipher
options.description: Lose 3 Max HP. Upgrade a random card.

name: Tanx
description:
SO WEAK! BUT YOU HAVE POTENTIAL!
USE THIS WEAPON!!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: GROW STRONGER SO WE CAN FIGHT!!!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: YOU CAN NEVER HAVE TOO MANY WEAPONS!!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: CONSTRUCT! NO WEAPONS!? HAVE THIS!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: ORBS ARE NOT WEAPONS!!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: FIGHT ME, DEFECT!!

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: The Defect valiantly fights.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: ORBS ARE WEAPONS!?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: IMPRESSIVE SWORD, WARRIOR! YOU CAN USE MORE WEAPONS!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: WEAPONS FOR THE WARRIOR! GRAB A WEAPON! LET’S FIGHT!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: FIGHT ME, IRONCLAD!!

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text: The Ironclad fights Tanx.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: YEEES!! MIGHTY FIGHT, TAKE WEAPON!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: WHAT A MIGHTY SCYTHE!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Yes, it’s special-made for vengeance.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: DOES THE HAND NEED A WEAPON!?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: FIGHT ME, OSTY!!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: FIGHT ME, NECROBINDER!!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: The Necrobinder and Osty scuffle with Tanx.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: MIGHTY TEAMWORK!! HAVE A WEAPON!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: ORANGE!? HOW IS THIS BEING ORANGE!??

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: All know that orange is the most regal color!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: INCREDIBLE! SO MIGHTY!!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: ORANGE ONE!! CHOOSE A MIGHTY WEAPON!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: FIGHT ME, REGENT!!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: No! We fought last time I was here!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: FIGHT ME AGAIN!!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: A HUNTRESS! I WILL SHARPEN YOUR CLAW!!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: WHY DAGGERS!! UNMIGHTY!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: FIGHT ME, SILENT!!

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: The Silent escapes, stealing a weapon on the way.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: WHERE DID YOU GO!!!

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
SO WEAK! BUT YOU HAVE POTENTIAL!
USE THIS WEAPON!!

name: Tea Master
description:
You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.

The man inside gestures to a selection of teas, each neatly labeled with a premium price.

name: Tezcatara
description:
Oh, a visitor! Do come in, dear!
What can Tezcatara do for you?

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Welcome back, sweetie. Let me burn away your flaws.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Do come in, dear! What can Tezcatara do for you today?

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <greetings beep>

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Not here to annoy me? What an unusual little construct...

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Now how silly would it be if he were unmade by one of his own?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Are you sure you want to be fixed up?

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <inquisitive beep>

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Well, if you’re really certain.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: You burn so pretty! Come in, come in!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Such a strong boy you are! Come and eat something.
Can’t slaughter on an empty stomach!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Ohh, Architect still alive? Kill him quickly would you?
I’ll be waiting right here!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Now what’s a skeleton doing inside these walls?

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
My aim is simple. Vengeance for my family.
I’ll reach the top and make him pay.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Wonderful!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Come in, come in! Let’s make your flames burn brighter.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Those flames around you remind me of something forbidden.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: What do you know?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: I know who wrote that book.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Oh my, what an exotic visitor! Who might you be, sweetie?

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I’m no sweetie! Address me with respect, giant... thing-person!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Where are my manners?
Tezcatara cackles with delight.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
You and your friends are back again?
I’ve made treats for you!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Welcome back regal boy! Looks like you’re doing great out there.

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Yes of course! Just some minor setbacks at the upper levels... like dying.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: We all need to learn from our mistakes.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Come closer, quiet one. I can’t see well...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: You can trust me.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Such a nasty sickness you have. Let’s take care of you.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: I’ve met your sisters, you know? Such lovely girls they are.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Oh dear... you haven’t been fighting have you?

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
Oh, a visitor! Do come in, dear!
What can Tezcatara do for you?

name: The Future of Potions?
description:
You feel a faint rumbling as you round the corner to discover a gigantic spinning apparatus!
It has several slots which appear to convert liquids into a highly compressed digestible tablet.

The idea of turning these health tonics into a tiny morsel is uncomfortable but perhaps it's good to try new things?

name: The Lantern Key
description:
You come upon a faintly glowing key and go to pick it up.

“Been looking all over for that key! Now if you don't mind...”

 This person looks like bad news but maybe it's not good to be judgy.

name: The Legends Were True
description:
Entering into a pitch dark chamber, a sudden light pierces the darkness from above, just as the door slams behind you.

Illuminated before you appears to be a podium with a map on it. You feel compelled to take it.

Suspicious.

name: This or That?
description:
Arms suddenly jut out from a nearby hole, clutching a suspicious bag of riches and a clearly cursed relic.

“This... or That?”
a scratched-up voice whispers from below.

options.title: That
options.description: Add  to your Deck. Obtain a random Relic.

name: Tinker Time
description:
Navigating through an endless sea of corpses, you find a mad scientist scavenging for various scraps.

“Yes. Hi, hello! You look like a capable fighter... I need a tester for my next atrocity device! How about it?”

options.title: Accept
options.description: Create a custom card to add to your Deck.

name: Trash Heap
description:
You discover a towering pile of scrapped weapons, discarded trinkets, and other oddities. The massive pile shifts and rumbles, as if growing from within...

If you scavenge from the surface, you may find some decent things. But if you really get in there, you may find some exotic treasures.

options.title: Dive In
options.description: Lose 8 HP. Obtain a random forgotten Relic from the past.

options.title: Grab Random Junk
options.description: Gain 100 Gold. Obtain a random forgotten card from the past.

name: The Trial
description:
You join a line of people entering a massive building.

As you pass under a golden archway, horns blare, confetti explodes, and streamers glide down from the ceiling!

“Entrant , you are the DECIDER for today's Trial.”

options.title: Reject
options.description: You are not allowed to Reject.

name: Unrest Site
description:
You find a secluded Rest Site and start a fire to get some rest.
Or so you thought.

Once the fire is started, it begins to swell, reaching not upwards but sideways towards a grove of oil-seeping trees.

Should you try resting anyways?

options.title: Kill the Trees
options.description: Lose 8 Max HP. Obtain a random Relic.

options.title: Rest Anyways
options.description: Heal to full HP. Receive Poor Sleep.

name: Vakuu
description: Give yourself to me and you will be feared as much as I.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Seeking glory in the Spire are we? I have some propositions for you...

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: 143. 143 times you’ve been here.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: You realize this never ends?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Broken one, let me perfect you.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Do you find it strange that your fellow constructs want you dead?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: If you bring me the Architect’s heart, I will restore your companion.

Defect.speaker: character
Defect.text: <fearful beeping>

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: What’s more important? Your creator or your friend?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Imagine seeing you again after so long.

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text:
SACRED DEMON!
What have you done to me!?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Exactly what you bargained for.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Do the lost tribes weigh on you...?
Vakuu howls with laughter.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: My puppet of puppets... why haven’t you killed the Architect yet?

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text: After I kill the Architect, I will kill YOU!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Yawn
I look forward to watching you fail.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: We both seek vengeance. It will have a cost to pay.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: I accept any cost. Every cost for his death.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: I know where you got that Hand.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: The Architect has gravely wounded us both.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Get on with it, demon. Show me your contracts.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Straight to business. Very well...

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: A being from the stars? Within these accursed walls?

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Do you know of me?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Yes, I think we can help each other.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: More of my power can be yours for a small price.

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I don’t think these deals are good. I’m not feeling great.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
You read the contracts thoroughly have you not?
You have signed them with full intent and responsibility no?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Are you not going to fulfill your end of the bargain?
How about another contract? Isn’t that better?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Killer.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: This won’t end well for you.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Vakuu displays his various contracts to the Silent

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: The Architect is not enough, kill your sisters too!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: No need for words, we are the same.

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text: Give yourself to me and you will be feared as much as I.

name: War Historian, Repy
description:
An academic is trapped in a hanging cage next to a treasure chest.

The academic is muttering about “One-Time-Use Keys” while furiously writing something.

Looks like you can unlock the cage or the chest.

options.title: Unlock the Cage
options.description: Lose Lantern Key. Obtain History Course.

options.title: Unlock the Chest
options.description: Lose Lantern Key. Procure 2 random Potions. Obtain 2 random Relics.

name: Waterlogged Scriptorium
description:
Navigating the murky passages, you stumble upon a withered figure working a small shop. The multitude of shelves are stuffed full of damp scrolls and parchment.

Noticing a patron has entered, the scribe-shopkeeper snaps to attention and gestures at some implements arranged on a desk.

options.title: Prickly Sponge
options.description: Pay 155 Gold. Enchant 2 cards with Steady.

options.title: Tentacle Quill
options.description: Pay 65 Gold. Enchant a card with Steady.

name: Welcome to Wongo's
description:
“Welcome to Wongo's. We have what you want at Wongtastic prices.” says the least enthusiastic clerk you have ever met.

“Peruse our wares and enjoy your time at Wongo's,” they continue, without even looking up.

options.title: Wongo's Bargain Bin
options.description: Pay 100 Gold. Obtain 1 random Common Relic.

options.title: Wongo's Mystery Box
options.description: Pay 300 Gold. Obtain 3 random Relics after 5 combats.

name: Wellspring
description:
You trace a low rumble to its source and find yourself captivated by a tranquil wellspring. The water is an emerald green with clusters of glowing motes.

It looks inviting. What can possibly go wrong?

options.title: Bathe
options.description: Remove 1 card from your Deck. Add 1 Guilty to your Deck.

name: Whispering Hollow
description:
Making your way through a hollow of dead trees you happen upon a single bone-white tree. Clay baubles hang off its branches, which curve inward like protective ribs.

Such a creepy tree. It whispers.

...make exchange.....

options.title: Hug the Tree
options.description: Lose 9 HP. Choose a card to Transform.

name: Wood Carvings
description:
You open a dusty box to find a set of 3 elaborate wood carvings:

A bird, snake, and... a torus?

A nearby pedestal has indentations which match the bottom of the carvings. Which carving will you place on the pedestal?

options.title: Bird
options.description: Choose 1 starter card to Transform into .

options.title: Locked
options.description: None of your cards can be Enchanted with Slither.

options.title: Torus
options.description: Choose 1 starter card to Transform into .

name: Zen Weaver
description:
You walk through a spider web and PANIC!
But then, a wave of calm washes over you...

“Calm down. I need you to quit fussing up my web.”

How did you calm down so quickly?
An itsy bitsy spider abseils down to meet you. It seems willing to impart some techniques for gold.

options.title: Arachnid Acupuncture
options.description: Pay 250 Gold. Remove 2 cards from your Deck.

options.title: Breathing Techniques
options.description: Pay 50 Gold. Add 2 Enlightenment to your Deck.

options.title: Emotional Awareness
options.description: Pay 125 Gold. Remove 1 card from your Deck.
